g.title: EVPN_Fabric
g.text: EVPN / VXLAN Fabric — OSPF Underlay + BGP EVPN Overlay + Anycast Gateway

g.title: BL_A->BL_B
g.text: border pair interconnect / vPC or MLAG

g.title: CAB1_A->CAB1_B
g.text: site pair interconnect / vPC or MLAG

g.title: DEV1
g.text: Dual-homed logically to site leaf pair

g.title: YD1_A->YD1_B
g.text: site pair interconnect / vPC or MLAG

g.title: DEV2
g.text: Dual-homed logically to site leaf pair

g.title: BLDA_A->BLDA_B
g.text: site pair interconnect / vPC or MLAG

g.title: DEV3
g.text: Dual-homed logically to site leaf pair

g.title: YD2_A->YD2_B
g.text: site pair interconnect / vPC or MLAG

g.title: DEV4
g.text: Dual-homed logically to site leaf pair

g.title: NOTES
g.text: • BGP EVPN overlay runs between leaf pairs and border leafs only.
• OSPF underlay runs on routed fabric links and provides ECMP.
• Same anycast gateway IPs exist at every site for VLAN 110 and VLAN 210.
• Border Leafs and Leafs participate in BOTH OSPF and BGP EVPN.
• Each border leaf is dual-homed northbound to DC1 and DC2 using routed L3 links.
• Spines are shown as OSPF-only in this design; BGP RR is optional.
